content:
Who We Are Dataverse is a Data & AI Engineering consultancy based in Sydney, Australia. We specialise in building intelligent, scalable data solutions that solve real-world business problems.
What We Do We work at the intersection of modern data engineering and artificial intelligence — helping organisations move from raw data to actionable intelligence.
Our work spans:
Data Pipeline Architecture — scalable, reliable, cloud-native pipelines AI Agent Development — intelligent automation using LangChain and OpenAI Cloud Infrastructure — Google Cloud, Cloud Run, and serverless architectures Data Platform Modernisation — migrating legacy systems to modern stacks Our Approach We believe in building production-grade systems from day one. Every solution we deliver is designed for reliability, observability, and scale.
Founder Rajesh Kancharla is a Data & AI Engineer with deep experience in cloud architecture, data pipelines, and AI systems.
Connect on LinkedIn
summary:
Who We Are

Dataverse is a Data & AI Engineering consultancy based in Sydney, Australia. We specialise in building intelligent, scalable data solutions that solve real-world business problems.

What We Do

We work at the intersection of modern data engineering and artificial intelligence — helping organisations move from raw data to actionable intelligence.

Our work spans:

  • Data Pipeline Architecture — scalable, reliable, cloud-native pipelines
  • AI Agent Development — intelligent automation using LangChain and OpenAI
  • Cloud Infrastructure — Google Cloud, Cloud Run, and serverless architectures
  • Data Platform Modernisation — migrating legacy systems to modern stacks

Our Approach

We believe in building production-grade systems from day one. Every solution we deliver is designed for reliability, observability, and scale.
title: About Dataverse

title: Contact

content:
What Dataverse Offers Data Engineering Design and build robust data pipelines that move, transform, and serve data reliably at scale. From batch ETL to real-time streaming — we architect solutions that grow with your business.
Cloud-native pipeline development (GCP, AWS, Azure) Data lakehouse architecture ETL/ELT modernisation Data quality and observability frameworks AI & Agent Development Build intelligent AI systems that automate complex workflows and augment human decision-making. We use the latest LLM frameworks to create production-ready AI agents.
LangChain-based AI agents RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems OpenAI and Gemini integrations WhatsApp and communication platform AI bots Cloud Architecture Design scalable, cost-effective cloud infrastructure that powers your data and AI workloads reliably.
Google Cloud Run deployments Serverless architecture design Cloud cost optimisation Infrastructure as Code Advisory & Strategy Not sure where to start with data or AI? We help organisations cut through the noise and build a practical roadmap that delivers real value.
Let’s Talk Have a project in mind? Reach out via LinkedIn or email us at hello@dataverse-ai.org
summary:
What Dataverse Offers

Data Engineering

Design and build robust data pipelines that move, transform, and serve data reliably at scale. From batch ETL to real-time streaming — we architect solutions that grow with your business.

  • Cloud-native pipeline development (GCP, AWS, Azure)
  • Data lakehouse architecture
  • ETL/ELT modernisation
  • Data quality and observability frameworks

AI & Agent Development

Build intelligent AI systems that automate complex workflows and augment human decision-making. We use the latest LLM frameworks to create production-ready AI agents.
title: Services

content:
Why I Started Writing I’ve been building a personal AI assistant called Jarvis on Google Cloud, working with LangChain, Python, and various APIs. Along the way I’ve learned a lot that isn’t documented well anywhere — so I’m writing it down here.
What I’ll Write About Data engineering patterns and real-world cloud architecture Building AI agents with LangChain and OpenAI Google Cloud Run deployments and gotchas Lessons from building Jarvis Stay tuned.
summary:
Why I Started Writing

I’ve been building a personal AI assistant called Jarvis on Google Cloud, working with LangChain, Python, and various APIs. Along the way I’ve learned a lot that isn’t documented well anywhere — so I’m writing it down here.

What I’ll Write About

  • Data engineering patterns and real-world cloud architecture
  • Building AI agents with LangChain and OpenAI
  • Google Cloud Run deployments and gotchas
  • Lessons from building Jarvis

Stay tuned.
title: Welcome to My Blog
